meta.description: Five 30-card starter decks for the Excalibur Con 2026 set. Convention Life, Duluth Spirit, Excalibur Experience, Stage Fright, and Quiet Growth.

decks.name: Convention Life
decks.description: People-heavy, Summer activate combos, burst LP. Expression (Red) + Learning (Blue), splash Community.
decks.strategy: Play lots of People with Convention, Artist, and Pop Culture tags. Use Summer activate abilities for burst LP. Combo with Convention Locations for cost reduction and card draw. Win fast through People synergy.

decks.name: Duluth Spirit
decks.description: Location-heavy, development over time, Winter scoring engine. Growth (Black) + Sustainability (Green), splash Community.
decks.strategy: Develop Locations with Duluth and Nature tags for compounding Winter LP. Use People to accelerate Location development. Patience and resource management win the long game. Community cards provide shared-benefit tempo.

decks.name: Excalibur Experience
decks.description: Guest-heavy, Event-driven, con-themed burst. Expression (Red) + Community (White), splash Learning.
decks.strategy: Deploy celebrity Guests backed by convention Locations. Fire off convention Events for burst LP. Celebrity Handler and Split Rock Stage discount and buff Guests. Celebrity One Shot and Cosplay Contest Finals are your big finishers. Win through high LP Events and Guest synergy.

decks.name: Stage Fright
decks.description: Event-burst aggro. Fire convention Events for burst LP. Quick People enable combos. Win fast before opponent Locations develop. Expression (Red) + Learning (Blue), splash Growth.
decks.strategy: Play cheap People with Convention and Gamer tags. Fire off high-LP Events like North Star Open, Silent Auction Bid, and Excalibur Con Grand Finale for burst scoring. RPG Hall and Tournament Arena buff Gamer plays. VIP Badge Holder and Sealed Draft Frenzy keep your hand full. Win before the opponent develops their board.

decks.name: Quiet Growth
decks.description: Long-game value engine. Develop Locations for compounding Winter LP. Card draw and resource management outvalue aggressive opponents. Sustainability (Green) + Community (White), splash Growth and Learning.
decks.strategy: Develop Locations like Pioneer Hall and Sensory Sanctuary for compounding Winter LP. Erin Glesner accelerates Location advancement. Card draw Events like Fresh Start and Word of Mouth keep your hand full. Community Cleanup Day and Shared Meal generate shared value while you build. Patience and resource management win the long game.

sharedCards.description: Cards that appear in multiple starter decks or could flex between them.
sharedCards.notes: 16 cards appear in multiple decks or work across archetypes.

unboundCards.description: Cards not assigned to any starter deck.
unboundCards.notes: 0 cards not assigned to any starter deck.
